rulings.Case Title: JAMESTOWN SA LLC; ET AL VS. JONATHAN DISHOTSKY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2021 line 1 . CROSS DEFENDANTS RICHARD KALUZA, ERIN THOMPSON, COMPASS CALIFORNIA II, INC.'S DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Cross-Complaint on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARIE A. BYRNE ET AL VS. JAMES LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANT JAMES LEE MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Moving party failed to show that any allegations in the complaint are false, irrelevant or not drawn in conformity with the law. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARIE A. BYRNE ET AL VS. JAMES LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANT JAMES LEE DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, complaint sufficiently states all causes of action and is not uncertain. Objection to RJN Exhibit E is GRANTED. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DELORES HOTEL, LLC VS. JENNIFER DECALLOS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2021 line 3. PLAINTIFF DOLORES HOTEL, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is OFF CALENDAR for Department 501. This matter was assigned to department 514 for trial on January 11, 2021. = (501/CFH)
